title: Privacy Policy
description: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices available to you.

sections.title: Introduction
paragraphs: Ansiversa is designed with privacy in mind. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have. It applies to ansiversa.com and the mini-apps in the Ansiversa ecosystem.

sections.title: Information We Collect
paragraphs: Information you provide
Name
Email address
Account preferences
Messages sent via Contact Us
Information collected automatically
Basic usage data (pages visited, actions taken)
Device and browser information
IP address (for security and abuse prevention)

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
paragraphs: Account creation and authentication
Providing access to apps and features
Saving preferences and favorites
Security and fraud prevention
Communication for important updates and support replies

sections.title: Data Sharing
paragraphs: We do not sell user data.
Data is not shared with third parties for advertising.
Limited sharing only when required, such as with infrastructure providers (hosting, email) or to meet legal obligations.

sections.title: Cookies & Local Storage
paragraphs: We use cookies to keep you logged in, remember preferences, and enhance security. We do not use third-party tracking cookies for advertising.

sections.title: Data Security
paragraphs: We use secure authentication, encrypted passwords, access controls, and other reasonable safeguards to protect your data. No system is 100% secure, but we follow best practices to reduce risk.

sections.title: Data Retention
paragraphs: We keep data only as long as necessary to provide services and meet legal requirements. You may request deletion in the future (or via Contact Us while we build self-service controls).

sections.title: Your Rights
paragraphs: Access your data
Update your information
Request deletion
Opt out of non-essential communications
You can make requests via the Contact Us page.

sections.title: Children's Privacy
paragraphs: Ansiversa is not intended for children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect personal data from children.

sections.title: Changes to This Policy
paragraphs: We may update this policy over time. Changes will be reflected on this page, and continued use of Ansiversa means you accept the latest version.

sections.title: Contact Information
paragraphs: Have a privacy question or request? Visit our Contact Us page to reach the team.
